title: eleocharis sundaica
intro: Eleocharis sundaica, also known as Japanese spikerush or East Asian spike rush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eleocharis sundaica include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems, while also exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and rhizomes are often dried, powdered, and used to make teas, infusions, or added to traditional remedies, showcasing its versatility in folk medicine.
